vocab.ti invito a: I invite you to; I encourage you to
vocab.un mi: a like (note: refers to 'like' on social media)

vocab.pubblicherò: I will publish; I will post

vocab.del mondo: in the world (lit. of the world)
vocab.il raccontarvi: telling you (to tell you; raccontare + vi = to you all)

vocab.non mi era: it had not (to me) (note: part of an impersonal construction, often 'it had not happened to me')

vocab.passato per l'anticamera del cervello: crossed my mind; occurred to me (idiom: never thought of)
vocab.fare arrampicata: to go climbing; to do climbing

vocab.un sacco di: a lot of; a ton of (colloquial)
vocab.poter: to be able to; can (infinitive construction)

vocab.ci si allena: one trains; people train; we train (impersonal/reflexive construction)
vocab.fa tutta la differenza del mondo: makes all the difference in the world
vocab.io mi sono: I have (reflexive auxiliary, part of past tense construction)

vocab.ci si segnava: one would sign up; people signed up

vocab.tantissime: very many; a lot of (feminine, plural)

vocab.placa: calm; slow (note: 'placa' is likely a typo or regional for 'placata' or 'placido', meaning calm or slow)

vocab.nel migliore dei modi: in the best way; in the best possible way

vocab.ad allenarsi: to train oneself; to work out

vocab.riusciamo a: we manage to; we are able to

vocab.è legato a: is linked to; is tied to

vocab.mi sono reso conto: I realized; I became aware (note: reflexive construction)

vocab.in ambio: in range; in scope (note: likely a typo for 'in ampio', meaning 'in wide [range]')

vocab.a farli: to make them; to do them
vocab.mi è bastato: it was enough for me; I just needed
vocab.di un determinato: of a certain; of a specific (note: incomplete, usually followed by a noun)

vocab.vanno a: go to; aim to (construction: 'go to' do something)

vocab.ecco che: here; so; thus (introducing a result or explanation)

vocab.su: on; onto (here as part of 'sulla', meaning 'on the')

vocab.andiamo a: let's go to; we go to

vocab.rivedersi: to review oneself; to watch oneself again

vocab.in un batter d'occhio: in the blink of an eye (very quickly)

vocab.riuscire a: to manage to; to succeed in

vocab.saper: to know how to; to be able to

vocab.prese: holds; grips (context: ways of placing feet)
vocab.mi collego: I connect; I link (context: I relate to)

vocab.il discorso: the matter; the topic; the issue
vocab.sono fondamentali: they are fundamental; they are essential

vocab.dobbiamo avere: we must have; we need to have

vocab.riusciamo a: we manage to; we are able to

vocab.sono costretto: I am forced; I have to (lit. I am forced)
vocab.le scarpette: the little shoes; the sneakers (diminutive, often for sports shoes)

vocab.scarpette: little shoes; slippers (note: diminutive of 'scarpe', often ballet shoes)
vocab.se le sono mai levate: they have never taken them off

vocab.andare a: go to; proceed to (note: often used to indicate starting or focusing on an action)

vocab.dedicarci: to dedicate ourselves; to devote ourselves (ci = ourselves)

vocab.distretto: district; area (here: body area, muscle group)

vocab.vi faccio: I give you; I make for you (note: 'vi' = to you all, 'faccio' = I do/make)

vocab.in leggero strapiombo: on a slight overhang; in slight overhang (climbing term)

vocab.un gran peccato: a great pity; a big shame

vocab.di pari passo: in step; together; hand in hand (idiom: at the same pace)

vocab.da padrona: dominant; in control (lit. as a mistress/master)

vocab.nel tempo: over time; in the long run

vocab.è inutile che: it's useless that; there's no point that

vocab.ci informiamo: we inform ourselves; we get information
vocab.rimaniamo fermi: we stay still; we stop (doing something)
vocab.ricominciare: to start again; to start over
vocab.tutto da capo: all over again; from the beginning
vocab.curare: to take care of; to look after
vocab.tantissima: a lot of; very much (feminine, singular, emphasis)

vocab.l'alto: the high; the top (note: here likely a typo for 'l'altro' meaning 'the other')

vocab.strapparci: to tear us away; to pull us off

vocab.basterebbe: it would be enough; it would suffice

vocab.a livello: at the level (figurative: in terms of)
vocab.siamo capaci di: we are able to; we can

vocab.da un punto di vista: from a point of view;from the perspective

vocab.provi a: you try to; you attempt to

vocab.farle: to do them; to make them (feminine, referring to 'trazioni')
vocab.le faccio: I do them; I make them

vocab.una propedeutica: a preparatory routine; a preparatory exercise (note: 'propedeutica' refers to something preparatory)
vocab.il trx: the TRX (note: TRX is a suspension training tool)
vocab.gli australian: the Australians (note: refers to 'Australian pull-ups', a type of exercise)

vocab.scarico: deload; lighter load (note: in fitness, means reducing intensity)
vocab.mi faccio aiutare: I get help; I let someone help me
vocab.faccio le negative: I do negatives (note: refers to negative/eccentric reps)

vocab.da curare: to take care of; to work on
vocab.abituarsi: to get used to; to become accustomed
vocab.tantissime persone: so many people; a lot of people
vocab.fenomeni: phenomena; prodigies; amazing people (colloquial: people who seem great)

vocab.prestazioni: performances; results (context: athletic or work performance)
vocab.il loro: their (masculine singular, refers to time or another noun)

vocab.degli: some; of the (masc. plural, partitive or article)

vocab.abituarsi: to get used to; to become accustomed to

vocab.stiamo facendo: we are doing; we are making
vocab.una fatica tremenda: a tremendous effort; a huge effort

vocab.dovrete: you will have to; you must (future tense, plural)

vocab.degli allenamenti: of the trainings; of the workouts

vocab.si prova a: one tries to; you try to (impersonal construction)

vocab.chiudere: to finish; to complete (in climbing: to send)

vocab.a medio e lungo termine: in the medium and long term

vocab.fa consumare: makes consume; causes to use (note: 'fa' = makes/does, 'consumare' = to consume/use up)

vocab.riuscire a: to manage to; to be able to
vocab.immaginarsi: to imagine oneself; to picture oneself

vocab.andare a prendere: to go get; to go take
vocab.le prese: the holds; the grips (note: in climbing context)

vocab.andare a prendere: go get; go take (context: to reach for something)
to go get; to go take

vocab.un casino: a mess; a lot of noise; chaos (slang, informal)
vocab.una fatica atroce: an atrocious effort; a terrible struggle

vocab.appigli: holds; grips (context: things to hold onto)

vocab.basta poco: it takes little; just a little is enough

vocab.si sta approcciando: is approaching; is starting (reflexive, ongoing action)

vocab.vi invito: I invite you; I encourage you

vocab.ci vediamo: see you; we'll see each other
